calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly as assigned from Department of the Presiding Judge (206) for Small Claim Appeal/Trial De Novo.
Plaintiffs/Respondents: Mathew Seliga and Gemma Aguiar are present in pro per. Jason Hain, Esq. for and with the Defendant/Appellant: Fraser Ritchie.
Parties are sworn, make opening statements to the Court, and respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions posted by the court.
Closing augument by both parties.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Newly evidence retained.
Judge Richard Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, not reported (306).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-15-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Continued To Nov-12-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 306
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar this date for trial de novo.

Appearances:
Matt Seliga, self-represented litigant, appeared.
Gemma Aguiar, self-represented litigant, appeared.
Jason Hain, Esq., appearing for and with Frasier Ritchie.

Matter called, all parties are sworn to testify. The Court addresses the schedule of today's proceedings. Mr. Hain requested a continuance of today's proceedings due to the unavailability of their witness, Gary Pasqunelli. Discussions held. At the conclusion of discussions, the Court granted Mr. Hain's request and continued the matter to November 12, 2014 at 1:30 pm in Department 306. Notice waived.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. (D306)
